name: @borjie/causal-inference
description: SOTA-CAUSAL — causal-inference primitives for Mr. Mwikila. Four-step pipeline (model -> identify -> estimate -> refute) implementing PCMCI+ (Runge et al., Python sidecar), Granger (pure TS), Pearl back-door / front-door identification, DoWhy ATE (Python sidecar), synthetic control (Abadie), differences-in-differences, regression discontinuity, twin-network counterfactuals, placebo / bootstrap / E-value refutation. Mining-domain wrappers and hash-chained `causal_runs` audit. See Docs/DESIGN/CAUSAL_INFERENCE_SOTA_2026.md.
